# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Prompt improvement
- [ ] Guide improvement
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Safety or limitation clarification

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is written in clear English.
- [ ] The change avoids unsupported claims.
- [ ] The change keeps prompts modular and reusable.
- [ ] Sensitive-domain guidance includes human-review boundaries where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, private data, or generated project outputs are included.
